task_description: Build a Modal app at `/home/user/modal_project/orchestrator.py` named `multi-entry-app` with three independent entry points and a shared Volume named `shared-state`. The app should have: (1) a `@app.function()` named `ingest_data` that writes records to the volume, (2) a `@app.function()` named `process_data` that reads and transforms records from the volume, (3) a `@app.function()` named `export_results` that reads processed data and writes a summary. A `@app.local_entrypoint()` named `main` orchestrates all three in sequence and writes a final report to `/home/user/modal_project/report.json`. Deploy with `modal deploy /home/user/modal_project/orchestrator.py --env modal-vsdatagen` and run with `modal run`. Verify app, volume listed, report.json exists.
truth:
File: /home/user/modal_project/orchestrator.py
Modal App name: multi-entry-app
Volume: modal.Volume.from_name('shared-state', create_if_missing=True)
Function ingest_data with @app.function(volumes={'/state': state_volume}): writes list of records as JSON to /state/raw_data.json, commits volume, returns {'ingested': <count>}
Function process_data with @app.function(volumes={'/state': state_volume}): reads /state/raw_data.json, transforms (e.g. uppercases string values), writes to /state/processed_data.json, commits, returns {'processed': <count>}
Function export_results with @app.function(volumes={'/state': state_volume}): reads /state/processed_data.json, computes summary stats (count, sample), writes to /state/summary.json, commits, returns summary dict
Local entrypoint main() calls all 3 in sequence: ingest_data.remote() -> process_data.remote() -> export_results.remote(), writes {'ingest': ..., 'process': ..., 'export': ...} to /home/user/modal_project/report.json
report.json must contain ingest, process, and export keys
Deploy: modal deploy /home/user/modal_project/orchestrator.py --env modal-vsdatagen
Run: modal run /home/user/modal_project/orchestrator.py --env modal-vsdatagen
App 'multi-entry-app' in modal app list --env modal-vsdatagen
Volume 'shared-state' in modal volume list --env modal-vsdatagen
